hero.name: Biraj Mahanta
hero.tagline: Building digital experiences with clean code and modern tools.

children.text: I'm a passionate software engineer who loves building scalable backend systems and intuitive frontends. I enjoy solving real-world problems through code.
When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or writing about what I've learned.

projects.title: Portfolio Backend
projects.description: A production-ready backend built with Node.js, Express, Strapi, and PostgreSQL. Features JWT auth, RBAC, and a clean REST API.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce application with product catalog, cart, checkout flow, and payment integration.

projects.title: Real-Time Chat App
projects.description: WebSocket-based chat application supporting rooms, direct messages, and presence detection.

timeline.title: Senior Software Engineer
timeline.description: Leading backend development for a SaaS product. Architecting microservices and mentoring junior engineers.

timeline.title: Software Engineer
timeline.description: Joined a product startup. Built REST APIs, integrated third-party services, and improved system performance by 40%.

timeline.title: Graduate
timeline.description: Graduated with a B.Tech in Computer Science. Started contributing to open source projects.

exploring.description: Exploring LLM APIs, prompt engineering, and integrating AI into product features.
Studying Kafka, distributed transactions, and eventual consistency patterns.

achievements.title: Open Source Contributor
achievements.description: Contributed to several Node.js and TypeScript open source libraries with merged PRs.

achievements.title: AWS Certified Developer
achievements.description: Passed the AWS Certified Developer Associate exam in 2023.

experience.description: Leading API development, mentoring team members, and driving architectural decisions for a B2B SaaS product.
Built and maintained REST APIs, integrated payment gateways, and improved backend performance.

education.description: Graduated with distinction. Focused on algorithms, data structures, and software engineering.

contact.quickInfoText: I'm open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and open source collaborations. Feel free to reach out — I'd love to connect.
